instruction: Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.
input: It was discovered that the cls_route filter implementation in the Linux kernel would not remove an old filter from the hashtable before freeing it if its handle had the value 0.
output: A vulnerability was identified in the cls_route filter of the Linux kernel. The issue occurs because the old filter is not removed from the hashtable before being freed if its handle value is zero.
